title: AI Trust & Safety Digest
tagline: A curated current snapshot of AI trust, safety, and governance, including as many materially important fresh items as the day warrants.
lead: Fresh trust-and-safety signal is thin in this batch. The strongest item is a new METR measurement effort on real-world AI use among technical workers, which matters because grounded evidence on capability uptake helps inform evaluation, deployment, and risk planning more than funding or enterprise-adoption messaging.

items.title: METR surveys technical workers on early-2026 AI productivity impact
items.why_it_matters: Real-world usage data helps calibrate capability uptake, deployment assumptions, and downstream risk assessments.

note: Selected from recent trust-and-safety relevant posts and papers by labs, evaluators, standards bodies, policy organizations, and arXiv, then summarized with GPT-5.4. Includes as many materially important fresh items as the day warrants.
